sections.title: Comparative & Superlative Adjectives — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Comparative & Superlative Adjectives — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Comparative & Superlative Adjectives is an essential building block of English grammar. Formula: Comparative: adjective + er + than (or 'more' + adj + than) | Superlative: the + adjective + est (or 'the most' + adj). Rules: Short adjectives (1 syllable): add -er/-est (tall -> taller -> tallest) | Long adjectives (2+ syllables): use more/most (beautiful -> more beautiful -> most beautiful) | Irregular forms: good -> better -> best, bad -> worse -> worst | Comparative compares two things; superlative compares three or more
sections.formula: Comparative: adjective + er + than (or 'more' + adj + than) | Superlative: the + adjective + est (or 'the most' + adj)

examples.english: Ram is taller than Shyam.
Ram is the tallest.

examples.hindi: यह फिल्म उस फिल्म से बेहतर है।
examples.english: This movie is better than that movie.
This is the best movie.

examples.hindi: यह किताब उससे ज्यादा दिलचस्प है।
examples.english: This book is more interesting than that one.
This is the most interesting book.

sections.title: Comparative & Superlative Adjectives — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Comparative & Superlative Adjectives — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Comparative & Superlative Adjectives for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Comparative: adjective + er + than (or 'more' + adj + than) | Superlative: the + adjective + est (or 'the most' + adj)

examples.english: He runs faster than me.
He runs the fastest.

examples.hindi: आज का मौसम कल से खराब है।
examples.english: Today's weather is worse than yesterday's.

examples.hindi: यह इस साल का सबसे खराब मौसम है।
examples.english: This is the worst weather this year.
This car is more expensive than that one.
This is the most expensive car.

sections.title: Comparative & Superlative Adjectives — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Comparative & Superlative Adjectives — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Comparative & Superlative Adjectives in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Comparative: adjective + er + than (or 'more' + adj + than) | Superlative: the + adjective + est (or 'the most' + adj)

examples.english: He is smaller than him.
He is the smallest.
This way is easier than that one.
This is the easiest way.

sections.title: Comparative & Superlative Adjectives — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Comparative & Superlative Adjectives — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Comparative & Superlative Adjectives. Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Comparative: adjective + er + than (or 'more' + adj + than) | Superlative: the + adjective + est (or 'the most' + adj)

examples.english: He is more hardworking than me.
He is the most hardworking.
This problem is harder than that one.
This is the hardest problem.
